name: grace-in-the-gap
description: Turns Claude Code wait states into brief, private, opt-in Scripture moments using Gloo and YouVersion adapters.

enabled.title: Enable wait-state moments
enabled.description: Show Grace moments during eligible Claude Code waits.

locale.title: Locale
locale.description: BCP 47 locale for reviewed reflections and a matching YouVersion Bible.

time_zone.title: Time zone
time_zone.description: IANA time zone used for local day, time window, and the church calendar.

tradition.title: Calendar tradition
tradition.description: ecumenical, catholic, mainline, or evangelical. Saints and local observances never apply without this choice.

preferred_tone.title: Preferred tone
preferred_tone.description: balanced, calm, steady, encouraging, or reflective.

show_selection_reason.title: Explain selection
show_selection_reason.description: Show up to three privacy-safe reason labels such as task, season, or retry context.

history_limit.title: Local diversity memory
history_limit.description: Number of recent profiles, snippets, and passages retained locally to reduce repetition.

context_mode.title: Context mode
context_mode.description: private ignores prompt content; local-labels derives only a coarse label on device.

minimum_wait_seconds.title: Minimum estimated wait
minimum_wait_seconds.description: Do not show a moment below this local wait estimate.

max_cards_per_day.title: Daily cap
max_cards_per_day.description: Maximum automatic moments per day; zero disables automatic cards.

telemetry_enabled.title: Local telemetry
telemetry_enabled.description: Write allow-listed product events locally. Raw prompts are never included.

gloo_client_id.title: Gloo client ID
gloo_client_id.description: Required. From Gloo AI Studio > API Credentials. Free for challenge participants.

gloo_client_secret.title: Gloo client secret
gloo_client_secret.description: Required. Stored in Claude Code secure storage.

gloo_endpoint_mode.title: Gloo endpoint mode
gloo_endpoint_mode.description: Use tools for schema-enforced V2 selection or grounded after publishing the project-owned catalog.

gloo_rag_publisher.title: Gloo publisher
gloo_rag_publisher.description: Publisher name required only for grounded endpoint mode.

yvp_app_key.title: YouVersion app key
yvp_app_key.description: Required. From the YouVersion Platform portal. Stored in Claude Code secure storage.
